title: The inverse Galois problem for Cherednik algebras
abstract: Given the spherical subalgebra $B$ of a rational Cherednik algebra, we aim to classify all finite groups $Γ$ for which there exists a domain $R$ on which $Γ$ acts by ring automorphisms, such that $B=R^Γ.$ We describe such groups in terms of geometry of the center of the reduction of $B$ modulo a large prime.
comment: 7 pages, preliminary version, all comments welcome
